name: selfresearcher
description: Premium Agentic Research CLI with Self-Improving Cognitive Substrate

scripts.setup: node -e "const {spawn} = require('child_process'); const os = require('os'); const cmd = os.platform() === 'win32' ? 'python' : 'python3'; spawn(cmd, ['setup_models.py'], {stdio: 'inherit'});"

author: Phillip Holland
